# aigateway_provider (Data Source)

Look up an existing gateway provider by id or name.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "aigateway_provider" "azure" {
  name = "Azure OpenAI 🇪🇺"
}

# Reference the looked-up provider id elsewhere:
# provider_id = data.aigateway_provider.azure.id
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `id` (String) Provider id. One of id or name is required.
- `name` (String) Provider name. One of id or name is required.

### Read-Only

- `api_version` (String)
- `auth_type` (String)
- `enabled` (Boolean)
- `endpoint` (String)
- `project_id` (String)
- `region` (String)
- `type` (String)
